0f4bf3c6ce651ec4b5350e4e4a2af1c4.webp:
1. Nice and spacious with good images in the Hero.
2. The fonts are very nice, Carousel at the bottom is nice.
3. Navbar is also well made.
4. 8 items card, Engagment bar is also nice.
1e4af30e21d9263c7ac4f80609d417c9.webp: The logo is nice with the name "nine days" being a 9x9 grid. Blue back drop is also a good contrast with white text
229c38441761240da5b86301cdb17ed9.webp:
1. Glassy Globe with equator lines showing "total profit" , "users" and other cards .
2. Bottom supporters page Stripe, Apple pay and Cash app is well made.
3. Typography is good and the page is spacious
306139286954bd17c5914885ddf41bf2.webp: Nice logo with the triangular lines spelling an A. Good logo for companies like "Alema" , "Atlass" etc.
337b521b63dcdfe1ac029a410e67ed8c.webp:
Great website for "Stryde Footwear" with Home,Stock and feed page. 

1. The hero image is very nice with a shoe on a race track.
2. Simple "Engineered for every move" herp and Price tag as well.
3. Shop now in the bottom right could be optimized for Middle-right
